faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Lindenhurst?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Lindenhurst typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property, the severity of the infestation, and whether multiple treatments are needed. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide flea treatment service in Lindenhurst?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day flea treatment services throughout Lindenhurst and Long Island. Our team understands that flea infestations require urgent attention, especially in homes with pets or children, and we prioritize rapid response times.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and family?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied by our licensed professionals. We'll provide clear instructions on any temporary precautions needed during treatment, typically requiring a few hours away from treated areas while products dry.

faqs.question: Will one flea treatment be enough to eliminate the infestation?
faqs.answer: Most flea infestations in Lindenhurst require 2-3 treatments spaced 2-3 weeks apart to fully eliminate all life stages including eggs, larvae, and adults. We'll assess your specific situation during inspection and recommend a treatment plan that ensures complete eradication and prevention of re-infestation.
